name: Sacos Corporation
summary: Sacos Corporation engages in the rental, leasing, import, export, and sale of machinery and equipment. It rents construction machinery, commercial cars, and office equipment. The company was formerly known as Sanko Machinery Leasing Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Sacos Corporation in September 1986. Sacos Corporation was founded in 1967 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan. Sacos Corporation is a subsidiary of Nishio Rent All Co., Ltd.
